Package io.forja.components.inputs.fxTextArea

Class FxTextArea

java.lang.Object
javafx.scene.Node
javafx.scene.Parent
javafx.scene.layout.Region
javafx.scene.layout.Pane
javafx.scene.layout.VBox
io.forja.components.inputs.fxTextArea.FxTextArea
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.css.Styleable, javafx.event.EventTarget
public class FxTextArea extends javafx.scene.layout.VBox
A styled multi-line text input with validation-state variants and an optional auto-resize behavior.

FxTextArea is a composite VBox of two children: the inner TextArea wrapped in a framed style class, and a helper/error FxLabel that auto-hides when both messages are empty.

The inner TextArea is accessible via getTextArea() for advanced binding. text and promptText on FxTextArea delegate directly to it.

When setAutoResize(boolean) is true, prefRowCount updates on text change to fit the line count, clamped between getRows() and getMaxRows(). wrapText is forced on so wrapped long lines stay visible (wrapped lines do not count toward the resize calculation — it is line-feed based).

The preferred way to construct an FxTextArea is via the builder:

     
      FxTextArea bio = FxTextArea.builder()
          .promptText("Tell us about yourself")
          .rows(4)
          .maxRows(12)
          .autoResize(true)
          .helperText("Max 500 characters.")
          .build();
See Also:
  • InputVariant
  • FxTextArea.Builder

    • getHelperText

      public String getHelperText()
      Returns the current helper text.

    • setHelperText

      public void setHelperText(String v)
      Sets the helper text. Empty/null hides the helper line.

    • errorTextProperty

      public javafx.beans.property.StringProperty errorTextProperty()
      Returns the error-text property.
      See Also:
      • getErrorText()
      • setErrorText(String)

    • getErrorText

      public String getErrorText()
      Returns the current error text.

    • setErrorText

      public void setErrorText(String v)
      Sets the error text. Non-empty value auto-flips the variant to InputVariant.ERROR; clearing it does not auto-revert.

    • autoResizeProperty

      public javafx.beans.property.BooleanProperty autoResizeProperty()
      Returns the auto-resize property.
      See Also:
      • isAutoResize()
      • setAutoResize(boolean)

    • isAutoResize

      public boolean isAutoResize()
      Returns whether auto-resize is enabled.

    • setAutoResize

      public void setAutoResize(boolean v)
      Sets whether the area grows/shrinks with its content (based on line-feed count, clamped to getRows() and getMaxRows()).

    • rowsProperty

      public javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty rowsProperty()
      Returns the minimum-rows property (default 4).

    • getRows

      public int getRows()
      Returns the current minimum row count.

    • setRows

      public void setRows(int v)
      Sets the minimum row count (the floor for auto-resize).

    • maxRowsProperty

      public javafx.beans.property.IntegerProperty maxRowsProperty()
      Returns the maximum-rows property (default 12).

      public int getMaxRows()
      Returns the current maximum row count.

      Sets the maximum row count (the ceiling for auto-resize).

    • isShowingError

      public boolean isShowingError()
      Returns whether the helper label is currently showing the error text.
